description: CompositionBlack round neck, blouson top made of 100% viscose, with a flanneled neck and  sleeves, and pleated from the rib lineFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironSubtle and feminine, this black top is a great addition to any girl's wardrobe. With a flanneled neck and sleeves, and pleated from the rib line, this top is perfect for those days when you want to tone down your fashion statement. The flanneled sleeves help make your arms look more toned, while the ribbing below the bust enhances your contours. Team this with skin tight jeans or skirts and stylish footwear available at myntra, and rock the party!Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
